behavior.name: pr-template
behavior.summary: Pull request body template structure for composing the PR description.
behavior.template:
## Summary - 1-3 bullet points describing what changed and why - Closes #{number} (if PR targets main) or Relates to #{number} (if PR targets a feature branch)
## Changes | File | Change | |------|--------| | path/to/file | Description of what changed |
## AI Suggested Testing Plan - [ ] Step 1 - [ ] Step 2
## Ticket #{number} — {link to GitHub Issue}
--- Generated by the starterpack orchestrator.
